queue_item.action: Define and test an audibility evidence ladder that prevents browser render evidence from being promoted into physical-audibility proof.

progress.finding: Render progress proves browser processing, not physical audibility; corroborated audibility requires declared destination routing plus an independent device meter or synchronized human report.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should combine window.__MC_AUDIO_EVIDENCE__, destination-route state, and the iPhone audible or meter result through this classifier. A browser-rendered result must remain audibility-unproven until independent confirmation exists.

coordination_note: Append this owned record during the next safe ACTIVE_QUEUE reconciliation; do not overwrite concurrent team changes.
